data.title: Clean Week

seo.title: Clean Week Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Change your lifestyle and get results with Clean Week. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf® Muscle Burns Fat® and #mbfa® Muscle Burns Fat Advanced® on Beachbody On Demand. Known for her straightforward workout style and upbeat personality, Megan knows what it takes to get you in the best shape of your life. Take one of her live BODi classes today!

data.descriptionShort: Clean Week helps you create healthy nutrition and fitness habits in just 7 days.
data.descriptionLong: Clean Week™ is a seven-day fitness and nutrition program designed to help you kick-start healthy habits that get real results and can lead to a lifestyle change that sticks!

modules.equipment: Dumbbells, Push-Up Stands*, Core Comfort Mat*
modules.categories: Cardio, Low Impact, Strength, Recovery, Bodyweight Training, Core

modules.title: Is Clean Week Right for Me?
modules.content: Clean Week is designed to help you kick-start healthy habits that get real results and can lead to a lifestyle change that sticks! You get 4 workouts, a step-by-step meal planner, and a week’s supply of delicious Shakeology®. Start living the healthy new lifestyle you want in just 7 days – With Clean Week.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: The 30-minute workouts focus on the foundations of fitness – Cardio, Strength, Core Function, and Flexibility – to create a well-rounded fitness program for any level.

modules.title: Shakeology: the nutrition your body’s been missing
modules.content: This daily superfood shake is the easiest and most delicious way to get a dose of dense nutrition and healthy energy. Clinically shown to help curb cravings and reduce hunger, Shakeology is the powerful superfood shake with as many as 60+ ingredients, plus a potent blend of proteins, pre- and probiotics, fiber, adaptogens, and antioxidants. No matter what your fitness and diet goals, Shakeology is the solid nutritional foundation to help you get there and stay there.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: BODi’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

trainers.bio: Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf® Muscle Burns Fat® and #mbfa® Muscle Burns Fat Advanced® on Beachbody On Demand. Known for her straightforward workout style and upbeat personality, Megan knows what it takes to get you in the best shape of your life. Take one of her live BODi classes today!

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.title: LIIFT4
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.description: Build muscle and burn calories with classic weightlifting and HIIT cardio.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.descriptionShort: Build muscle and burn calories with classic weightlifting and HIIT cardio.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvMobq4.descriptionLong: LIIFT4 combines heavy lifting and intense cardio to transform your body in 4 days a week. And with 32 unique, real-time workouts, you’ll never get bored, because you’ll never do the same one twice.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVtQO.title: #mbf
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVtQO.description: Build muscle and burn fat with daily strength-training and cardio workouts.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVtQO.descriptionShort: Build muscle and burn fat with daily strength-training and cardio workouts.
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvNVtQO.descriptionLong: Get leaner, get stronger, get healthier as you ignite your metabolism and incinerate fat. For three weeks, you'll follow weightlifting and cardio workouts that are set to the music beat, so you know the intensity you’ll need to get maximum results.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOtUy8.title: Day 1: Core Function
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOtUy8.descriptionLong: You’ll shape and define your abs through full-body functional movements that engage your core from every angle in this dynamic, calorie-burning workout.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf Muscle Burns Fat, #mbfa Muscle Burns Fat Advanced, and Sure Thing. After appearing on BODi’s fitness reality show, THE 20s, Megan became the next Super Trainer and created Clean Week. Her passion for learning about physiology, health, fitness, and technique fuels every program she creates. Her down-to-earth, empowering workout style and upbeat personality make you feel like you’re training with a best friend.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOtVbs.title: Day 2: Cardio
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvOtVbs.descriptionLong: This heart-pumping interval routine will shift your metabolism into a higher gear, helping you burn more fat and feel more energized.
